action_text: Click the operator combobox for the first filter condition
rationale: The operator is currently "starts with"; to meet the requirement we need to change it to "contains", so first open the operator menu.

action_text: Press Enter on the operator combobox to expand its options
rationale: If clicking doesn’t open the operator menu, using the keyboard can expand it; we need access to select "contains".

action_text: Type "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the filter value textbox
rationale: We also need to supply the value for the condition; entering the target token prepares the filter.
After configuring the condition, we must execute it to filter the list.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the Short description column search field
rationale: As an alternative path, using the per-column search on Short description can quickly narrow to rows containing the token if the filter builder is finicky.
